title: [cross-impl] KDF label divergence: int vs tstr in exporter
description: Python/C use CBOR int labels (0/1/7/10) for edhoc_kdf/export (per RFC and edhoc_export_kdf comment "match Python"). Rust uses tstr ("0","7", etc) producing different info bytes, different master_secret/salt (e.g. 2762d4e3... vs test expectations). Breaks OSCORE context after EDHOC. Commits touching edhoc.rs (402298f95,a3f724ba7,40f1a5205,e6e028528) and oscore.c (707024b63 etc) left this mismatch. Test vectors/edhoc.json inconsistent across impls.
